evals.name: density-insight-wave
evals.prompt: Erstelle Features für das Produkt cogni-portfolio mit diesen Capabilities: Portfolio-Zerlegung nach IS/DOES/MEANS, Taxonomie-Klassifizierung, Qualitätsbewertung, Web-Research-Enrichment, Proposition-Generierung, Stakeholder-Review.
evals.expected_output: 5-7 features with short slugs (max 3 segments), descriptions naming ONE mechanism each, no enumeration of all 6 capabilities in a single description

assertions.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description lists 3+ comma-separated parallel components/activities
Each description names a core mechanism, not a catalog of sub-capabilities

evals.name: density-marketing
evals.prompt: Erstelle Features für eine Content-Marketing-Plattform: GTM-Pfade, Thought Leadership, ABM-Kampagnen, Brand Voice, Kanalsteuerung, zweisprachig DE/EN, Performance-Analytics.
evals.expected_output: Features with short slugs, each describing ONE mechanism. Should NOT produce a single feature that enumerates all 7 components.

assertions.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description lists 3+ comma-separated parallel components/activities
The 7 input capabilities are consolidated into fewer features (not 1:1 mapping)

evals.name: density-partner
evals.prompt: Erstelle Features für ein Partner-Portal: Co-Delivery-Projekte, Revenue-Share-Modell, Support-Zugang, Industry-Catalog-Zugriff, Pipeline-Matching.
evals.expected_output: Features describing mechanisms (what the portal IS), not benefits. Short slugs like partner-matching, not partner-network-access-portal.

assertions.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description uses outcome verbs (enables, reduces, ensures, hilft, ermöglicht) or describes benefits
Descriptions explain what the feature IS (mechanism), not what it DOES for the partner (benefits)
